needs_client_action.reason: We need Empower's feedback on whether the 'job seeker' call volume has decreased since the LSA copy updates.

strategic_direction.title: Lead Quality Recalibration
strategic_direction.reasoning: The last meeting highlighted a major pain point: job seekers flooding the LSA lines. Now that landing pages are on Webflow and GTM is fixed, we must pivot from 'fixing tech' to 'filtering intent' to protect the ROAS.

strategic_direction.title: Transition to Performance Reporting
strategic_direction.reasoning: With tracking fixes (GTM/CallRail) completed, the prerequisite for a real-time dashboard is met. Moving them to a formal reporting service will reduce manual 'wonky data' discussions.

strategic_direction.title: Summer HVAC Seasonality Push
strategic_direction.reasoning: In the home-services sector, April is the window to launch 'AC Tune-up' specials. Since Phoenix budget moved to Fresno, we should optimize Fresno for high-intent cooling keywords.

suggested_agenda.notes: Celebrate the successful Webflow migration and GTM tracking fixes.
Review the LSA/CallRail audit results. Confirm if 'job seeker' calls have dropped.
Pitch the Reporting Dashboard and the Summer AC promo strategy.
Confirm owners for Fresno budget transfer and Kern County exclusion.

projected_roadmap.title: Unified Marketing Performance Dashboard
projected_roadmap.what: Creation of a real-time Looker Studio dashboard integrating Google Ads, LSA, and CallRail data. This provides a single source of truth for cost-per-lead and lead quality metrics.
projected_roadmap.why_now: Now that we've fixed the Google Tag Manager tracking and resolved the Webflow landing page issues, we have clean data. It’s time to move away from 'wonky' manual data checks.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 6 hours for dashboard build and API integration in week 1.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: 15-minute review and approval of key metrics to be tracked.
projected_roadmap.impact: Eliminates confusion over data discrepancies and allows the client to see their ROAS 24/7 without waiting for huddles.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: Now that we've stabilized the tracking and the new landing pages are live, I want to make sure you have total visibility. I'd like to set up a unified dashboard so you can see exactly where every lead is coming from in real-time, which will stop those 'wonky data' headaches we've been having.

projected_roadmap.title: HVAC 'Summer Surge' AC Campaign Launch
projected_roadmap.what: Development of a specific 'Beat the Heat' seasonal campaign for the Fresno market, including ad copy focused on AC repair/replacement and updated landing page offers.
projected_roadmap.why_now: With the Phoenix budget successfully transferred to Fresno and the HVAC staffing shortage addressed, we need to capitalize on the upcoming seasonal demand shift before competitors flood the market.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 4 hours for keyword research and ad creative creation.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: Approval of the 'AC Tune-up' special offer (e.g., $X off).
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Pause Phoenix HVAC ads and transfer budget to Fresno (Active)
projected_roadmap.impact: Maximizes lead volume during the highest-revenue months for HVAC services.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: With the Fresno team ready to scale and summer right around the corner, we should launch a 'Summer Surge' campaign. We’ve already moved the budget over; now we just need to nail down a specific AC offer to capture that demand before the heat really hits.

projected_roadmap.title: LSA Lead Management Training & Automation
projected_roadmap.what: A deep-dive workshop and setup of automated 'dispute' triggers for job-seeker calls in LSA, ensuring Empower gets credits back for non-lead calls.
projected_roadmap.why_now: The March 18th meeting identified job seekers as a major drain on the LSA budget. Beyond just changing copy, we need a systematic way to recoup those costs.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 2-hour training session + 2 hours setting up CallRail-to-LSA feedback loops.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: 1 hour for the office manager to join a training session on lead dispositioning.
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Update LSA profile copy to filter job seekers (Active)
projected_roadmap.impact: Directly reduces wasted ad spend by reclaiming budget from unqualified calls.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: We’re working on filtering out those job seekers with the new ad copy, but I want to take it a step further. I’d like to show your team a quick system to dispute those calls within the platform so you actually get your money back from Google when those non-leads slip through.

talking_points.Grant administrator access for CallRail: Great news—Megan got the CallRail admin access sorted, which means we can now move much faster on those tracking updates without hitting bottlenecks.
talking_points.Rebuild landing pages on Webflow: The landing pages are officially live on Webflow! This is a huge win for our site speed and gives us much better control over the conversion layout.
talking_points.Update CallRail and LSA tracking numbers: Dan is finalizing the tracking number updates; we're making sure the LSAs and CallRail are talking to each other perfectly so no lead goes uncounted.
talking_points.Lead Quality Feedback: We've implemented the copy changes to filter out job seekers—have you noticed a change in the types of calls the team is fielding over the last week?
talking_points.Unified Marketing Performance Dashboard: I want to put something on your radar: now that our tracking is clean, we should move you into a real-time dashboard so you can see your lead costs at a glance.
talking_points.Pause Phoenix HVAC ads and transfer budg: We're in the process of shifting that Phoenix budget over to Fresno to keep the momentum going where you have the staffing to support it.
talking_points.HVAC 'Summer Surge' AC Campaign Launch: Since summer is the 'go-time' for your industry, I’d like to start prepping a Fresno-specific AC push now so we're the first ones people see when their cooling fails.
